headline: Mizuho Raises its Price Target on Duke Energy (DUK) to $139
summary: Duke Energy Corporation (NYSE:DUK) is one of the 15 Best Power Generation Stocks To Buy For Data Center Demand. On May 6, 2026, Mizuho raised its price target on Duke Energy Corporation (NYSE:DUK) to $139 from $130 previously and maintained an Outperform rating on the shares.
